title: cyclosorus mindanaensis
intro: Cyclosorus mindanaensis, also known as the Mindanao sword fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus mindanaensis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin conditions and wounds. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and its extracts have been used in various pharmaceutical applications.
